response.original_title: フォルティクス　配信！推しを継ぐもの
response.overview: Tsuyoshi Honjo and Naoto Soda are employees of an unremarkable production company, SLOPPY DOGS are huge fans of the popular tokusatsu series, "Shinsei Denshou Forticus" that's streaming on TTFC. Instead of working, they watch Forticus and get scolded by their colleague, Koharu Umishiro. One day, after being pressured by their boss to go on an interview, the three of them got caught up in a crazy incident! And then the "real" Forticus appears?!
response.title: Forticus: Streaming! The One Who Inherits His Oshi
